```{r}
species_ti <- protein_final_u %>%
  select(Species_ID, TrophicIndex) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID) %>%
  summarise(mean_trophic_index = mean(TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

analysis_df <- species_covars %>%
  left_join(species_bray, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  left_join(species_ti,  by = "Species_ID") %>%
  left_join(
    species_taxonomy %>% select(Species_ID, Phylum, Genus) %>% distinct(),
    by = "Species_ID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group_For_Plots = factor(Group_For_Plots, levels = trophic_order),
    Genus2 = ifelse(Genus %in% c("Limnohabitans", "Limnohabitans_A"), "Limnohabitans", Genus),
    highlight_label = case_when(
      Genus2 == "Flavobacterium"   ~ "Flavobacterium",
      Genus2 == "Planktophila"     ~ "Planktophila",
      Genus2 == "Fonsibacter"      ~ "Fonsibacter",
      Phylum == "Planctomycetota"  ~ "Planctomycetota (phy)",
      TRUE                         ~ "Rest"
    ),
    highlight_label = factor(highlight_label, levels = highlight_levels)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(n_dates), n_dates >= 5,
    is.finite(mean_prot_count), mean_prot_count > 0,
    is.finite(mean_TPF), mean_TPF > 0, mean_TPF < 1,
    is.finite(mean_bray), mean_bray >= 0, mean_bray <= 1,
    is.finite(mean_trophic_index)
  ) %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

# =========================================================
# 6) FIGURE A
#    - scatter + marginal densities (as before)
#    - dots: gradient within each trophic group by trophic index
#    - curve: back-transformed prediction from logit(BC) ~ log10(TPF)
#    - dot size fixed (size = 8)
#    - no legend inside panel; one combined legend at right:
#        * trophic strategy
#        * gradients explanation (3 rows with gradient bars)
# =========================================================

eps <- 1e-6

# Prepare transformed variables for inference model
analysis_A <- analysis_df %>%
  mutate(
    x_mean  = mean_TPF,
    y_mean  = pmin(pmax(mean_bray, eps), 1 - eps),
    logit_y = qlogis(y_mean),
    log10_x = log10(x_mean)
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(logit_y), is.finite(log10_x), is.finite(x_mean), is.finite(y_mean))

# Fit inference model ON TRANSFORMED SCALE
m_logit <- lm(logit_y ~ log10_x, data = analysis_A)

# Report inference numbers (computed on transformed scale)
b <- coef(summary(m_logit))
beta  <- b["log10_x", "Estimate"]
pval  <- b["log10_x", "Pr(>|t|)"]
ci    <- confint(m_logit, "log10_x", level = 0.95)
ci_lo <- ci[1]; ci_hi <- ci[2]
N_A   <- nrow(analysis_A)

ann_txt <- paste0(
  "Inference (logit–log model):\n",
  "logit(BC) ~ log10(mean TPF)\n",
  "β = ", round(beta, 3),
  "  95% CI [", round(ci_lo, 3), ", ", round(ci_hi, 3), "]\n",
  "p = ", fmt_p(pval), "   N = ", N_A
)

# Build model-derived curve:
#   1) generate a grid of TPF values on the original x-scale
#   2) predict on the transformed scale (logit BC)
#   3) back-transform to BC using inverse-logit plogis()
x_min <- max(0.001, min(analysis_A$x_mean, na.rm = TRUE))
x_max <- min(0.999, max(analysis_A$x_mean, na.rm = TRUE))
x_grid <- seq(x_min, x_max, length.out = 300)

pred_df <- data.frame(x_mean = x_grid) %>%
  mutate(log10_x = log10(x_mean))

pred_df$pred_bc <- plogis(predict(m_logit, newdata = pred_df))

# Within-group gradient (darker = lower trophic index)
analysis_A <- analysis_A %>%
  group_by(Group_For_Plots) %>%
  mutate(ti_scaled = scales::rescale(mean_trophic_index, to = c(0, 1))) %>%
  ungroup()

ramp_col <- function(group_name, t) {
  scales::colour_ramp(c(trophic_cols_dark[[group_name]], trophic_cols[[group_name]]))(t)
}

analysis_A$fill_ti <- mapply(
  ramp_col,
  as.character(analysis_A$Group_For_Plots),
  analysis_A$ti_scaled
)

# Base scatter (legend removed here; we add a single external legend)
pA_base <- ggplot(analysis_A, aes(x = x_mean, y = mean_bray, color = Group_For_Plots)) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = fill_ti),
    shape = 21,
    stroke = 0,
    size = 8,
    alpha = 0.90
  ) +
  # Discrete color mapping is kept for:
  #   - consistent grouping
  #   - marginal density colors
  scale_color_manual(
    values = trophic_cols,
    drop = FALSE,
    labels = c("Oligo-like", "Intermediate", "Copio-like")
  ) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  geom_line(
    data = pred_df,
    aes(x = x_mean, y = pred_bc),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = axis_breaks_01) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = axis_breaks_01) +
  labs(
    title = "Higher transporter investment predicts functional stability",
    subtitle = "Lower Bray–Curtis dissimilarity indicates higher stability; black curve is model-implied (no CI ribbon).",
    x = "Mean transporter proteome fraction (TPF)",
    y = "Mean variability (Bray–Curtis dissimilarity)",
    color = "Trophic strategy"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "label",
    x = Inf, y = Inf,
    hjust = 1.02, vjust = 1.02,
    label = ann_txt,
    size = 3.2,
    label.size = 0.25
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"   # remove per-plot legend
  ) +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1)

# Add marginal densities (keep as your original: colored+filled by trophic strategy)
pA_marg <- ggMarginal(
  pA_base,
  type = "density",
  margins = "both",
  groupColour = TRUE,
  groupFill   = TRUE,
  alpha = 0.25,
  size  = 4
)

gA_plot <- grid::grid.grabExpr(print(pA_marg))

# ---- External combined legend (RIGHT SIDE) ----
#  (1) Trophic strategy legend
legend_strategy_df <- data.frame(Group_For_Plots = factor(trophic_order, levels = trophic_order), y = 1)
pLEG_strategy <- ggplot(legend_strategy_df, aes(x = Group_For_Plots, y = y, color = Group_For_Plots)) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = trophic_cols,
    drop = FALSE,
    labels = c("Oligo-like", "Intermediate", "Copio-like")
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Trophic strategy", ncol = 1, byrow = TRUE)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.25, "lines")
  )
gLEG_strategy <- get_legend(pLEG_strategy)

#  (2) Gradient bars legend (3 rows, one per trophic strategy)
grad_df <- expand.grid(
  x = seq(0, 1, length.out = 120),
  Group_For_Plots = factor(trophic_order, levels = trophic_order)
)
grad_df$col <- mapply(
  function(g, x) scales::colour_ramp(c(trophic_cols_dark[[as.character(g)]], trophic_cols[[as.character(g)]]))(x),
  grad_df$Group_For_Plots,
  grad_df$x
)

pLEG_grad <- ggplot(grad_df, aes(x = x, y = Group_For_Plots, fill = col)) +
  geom_tile(height = 0.85) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 1),
    labels = c("low", "high"),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Trophic index",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Within-group shading\n(darker = lower index)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
  )

gLEG_grad <- ggplotGrob(pLEG_grad)

A_leg_col <- arrangeGrob(
  gLEG_strategy,
  gLEG_grad,
  ncol = 1,
  heights = c(0.9, 1.1)
)

FIG_A <- arrangeGrob(
  gA_plot,
  A_leg_col,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(3.8, 1.4)
)

grid.newpage(); grid.draw(FIG_A)
export_grob_pdf(
  FIG_A,
  base = "Figure_A_MEANxMEAN_BrayCurtisDissim_vs_TPF_A4_landscape",
  width = 11.69, height = 8.27
)

# =========================================================
# 7) FIGURE B/C 
#    - Dot size encodes mean_prot_count
#    - One legend column on the right:
#        * size legend (mean proteins detected)
#        * highlight legend (fill)
#    - Fixes:
#        * no bracket warnings
#        * legend extraction works
# =========================================================

# ---- bracket helper WITHOUT ggplot "length 1 aesthetics" warnings ----
add_sig_brackets2 <- function(p, y_max, p12, p13, p23,
                              mults = c(1.10, 1.22, 1.34),
                              tick_frac = 0.03,
                              text_mult = 1.015) {
  t <- y_max * tick_frac

  # segments via annotate() (single-row by design)
  p +
    annotate("segment", x=1, xend=2, y=y_max*mults[1], yend=y_max*mults[1]) +
    annotate("segment", x=1, xend=1, y=y_max*mults[1]-t, yend=y_max*mults[1]) +
    annotate("segment", x=2, xend=2, y=y_max*mults[1]-t, yend=y_max*mults[1]) +
    annotate("text", x=1.5, y=y_max*mults[1]*text_mult, label=star(p12), size=4) +

    annotate("segment", x=1, xend=3, y=y_max*mults[2], yend=y_max*mults[2]) +
    annotate("segment", x=1, xend=1, y=y_max*mults[2]-t, yend=y_max*mults[2]) +
    annotate("segment", x=3, xend=3, y=y_max*mults[2]-t, yend=y_max*mults[2]) +
    annotate("text", x=2.0, y=y_max*mults[2]*text_mult, label=star(p13), size=4) +

    annotate("segment", x=2, xend=3, y=y_max*mults[3], yend=y_max*mults[3]) +
    annotate("segment", x=2, xend=2, y=y_max*mults[3]-t, yend=y_max*mults[3]) +
    annotate("segment", x=3, xend=3, y=y_max*mults[3]-t, yend=y_max*mults[3]) +
    annotate("text", x=2.5, y=y_max*mults[3]*text_mult, label=star(p23), size=4)
}

jit <- position_jitter(width = 0.3, height = 0, seed = 1)

clean_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.25),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
    legend.position = "none",              # IMPORTANT: no legends inside panels
    plot.margin = margin(28, 10, 10, 10)
  )

pt_stroke <- 0.35
ylim_headroom <- c(0, 1.18)

analysis_BC <- analysis_df %>%
  mutate(
    log_mean_tpf  = log10(pmin(pmax(mean_TPF, eps), 1 - eps)),
    log_mean_bray = log10(pmin(pmax(mean_bray, eps), 1 - eps))
  )

# Inference
kw_mean_tpf <- kruskal.test(log_mean_tpf ~ Group_For_Plots, data = analysis_BC)
pw_mean_tpf <- pairwise_wilcox_tidy(analysis_BC$log_mean_tpf, analysis_BC$Group_For_Plots)
p_mean_OI <- get_pw(pw_mean_tpf, "Oligo_like", "Intermediate")
p_mean_OC <- get_pw(pw_mean_tpf, "Oligo_like", "Copio_like")
p_mean_IC <- get_pw(pw_mean_tpf, "Intermediate", "Copio_like")

kw_mean_bray <- kruskal.test(log_mean_bray ~ Group_For_Plots, data = analysis_BC)
pw_mean_bray <- pairwise_wilcox_tidy(analysis_BC$log_mean_bray, analysis_BC$Group_For_Plots)
p_mbray_OI <- get_pw(pw_mean_bray, "Oligo_like", "Intermediate")
p_mbray_OC <- get_pw(pw_mean_bray, "Oligo_like", "Copio_like")
p_mbray_IC <- get_pw(pw_mean_bray, "Intermediate", "Copio_like")

# Size legend breaks
size_breaks_BC <- analysis_BC %>%
  summarise(
    mn = as.integer(round(min(mean_prot_count, na.rm = TRUE))),
    q1 = as.integer(round(quantile(mean_prot_count, 1/3, na.rm = TRUE))),
    q2 = as.integer(round(quantile(mean_prot_count, 2/3, na.rm = TRUE))),
    mx = as.integer(round(max(mean_prot_count, na.rm = TRUE)))
  ) %>%
  unlist(use.names = FALSE) %>%
  unique() %>%
  sort()

if (length(size_breaks_BC) < 4) {
  mn <- min(analysis_BC$mean_prot_count, na.rm = TRUE)
  mx <- max(analysis_BC$mean_prot_count, na.rm = TRUE)
  size_breaks_BC <- unique(as.integer(round(seq(mn, mx, length.out = 4))))
}

size_labels_BC <- as.character(size_breaks_BC)
size_labels_BC[1] <- paste0(size_labels_BC[1], " (min)")
size_labels_BC[length(size_labels_BC)] <- paste0(size_labels_BC[length(size_labels_BC)], " (max)")

# --- Panels (no legends) ---
pB <- ggplot(analysis_BC, aes(x = Group_For_Plots, y = mean_TPF)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.60, outlier.shape = NA, fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = highlight_label, size = mean_prot_count),
    position = jit,
    shape = 21, color = "black",
    stroke = pt_stroke, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = highlight_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    name   = "Mean proteins detected (count)",
    range  = c(4, 12),
    breaks = size_breaks_BC,
    labels = size_labels_BC
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = axis_breaks_01, expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = ylim_headroom, clip = "off") +
  labs(
    title = "B  Mean transporter allocation differs among trophic strategies",
    subtitle = paste0("Inference on log10(values): Kruskal–Wallis p = ", fmt_p(kw_mean_tpf$p.value)),
    y = "Mean transporter proteome fraction (TPF)"
  ) +
  clean_theme

pB <- add_sig_brackets2(pB, 1, p_mean_OI, p_mean_OC, p_mean_IC,
                        mults = c(1.06, 1.11, 1.16), tick_frac = 0.02, text_mult = 1.01)

pC <- ggplot(analysis_BC, aes(x = Group_For_Plots, y = mean_bray)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.60, outlier.shape = NA, fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = highlight_label, size = mean_prot_count),
    position = jit,
    shape = 21, color = "black",
    stroke = pt_stroke, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = highlight_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    name   = "Mean proteins detected (count)",
    range  = c(4, 12),
    breaks = size_breaks_BC,
    labels = size_labels_BC
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = axis_breaks_01, expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = ylim_headroom, clip = "off") +
  labs(
    title = "C  Functional variability differs among trophic strategies",
    subtitle = paste0("Inference on log10(values): Kruskal–Wallis p = ", fmt_p(kw_mean_bray$p.value)),
    y = "Mean variability (Bray–Curtis dissimilarity)"
  ) +
  clean_theme

pC <- add_sig_brackets2(pC, 1, p_mbray_OI, p_mbray_OC, p_mbray_IC,
                        mults = c(1.06, 1.11, 1.16), tick_frac = 0.02, text_mult = 1.01)

# --- Legend extraction: make a LEGEND-ENABLED pB version (only for grabbing legends) ---
pB_leg <- ggplot(analysis_BC, aes(x = Group_For_Plots, y = mean_TPF)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.60, outlier.shape = NA, fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = highlight_label, size = mean_prot_count),
    position = jit,
    shape = 21, color = "black",
    stroke = pt_stroke, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = highlight_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    name   = "Mean proteins detected (count)",
    range  = c(4, 12),
    breaks = size_breaks_BC,
    labels = size_labels_BC
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

gLEG_size <- get_legend(pB_leg + guides(fill = "none"))
gLEG_high <- get_legend(pB_leg + guides(size = "none") +
                          guides(fill = guide_legend(title = NULL, ncol = 1, byrow = TRUE)))

# --- Assemble figure ---
BC_stack <- arrangeGrob(
  ggplotGrob(pB),
  ggplotGrob(pC),
  ncol = 1,
  heights = c(1, 1)
)

BC_leg_col <- arrangeGrob(
  gLEG_size,
  gLEG_high,
  ncol = 1,
  heights = c(1.1, 1.0)
)

FIG_BC <- arrangeGrob(
  BC_stack,
  BC_leg_col,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(3.2, 1.1)
)

grid.newpage(); grid.draw(FIG_BC)
export_grob_pdf(
  FIG_BC,
  base = "Figure_BC_MEANxMEAN_BrayCurtisDissim_and_TPF_A4_landscape",
  width = 8.27, height = 8.27
)

############################################################
# EXPORT FINAL FIGURE STATS SUMMARY
############################################################

stats_file <- "final_figure_stats_summary.txt"
sink(stats_file)

cat("FINAL FIGURE STATS SUMMARY\n")
cat("====================================\n\n")

cat("DATA SUMMARY\n")
cat("------------------------------------\n")
cat("Species included:", nrow(analysis_df), "\n")
cat("Transitions (Bray–Curtis pairs):", nrow(bray_transitions), "\n\n")

# =========================================================
# FIGURE A — regression model
# =========================================================

cat("FIGURE A: Investment vs Functional Stability\n")
cat("------------------------------------\n")
cat("Model: logit(Bray–Curtis dissimilarity) ~ log10(mean TPF)\n\n")

print(summary(m_logit))

cat("\nConfidence intervals:\n")
print(confint(m_logit))

cat("\n")

# =========================================================
# FIGURE B — mean transporter allocation
# =========================================================

cat("FIGURE B: Mean transporter allocation by trophic strategy\n")
cat("------------------------------------\n")

cat("\nKruskal–Wallis test:\n")
print(kw_mean_tpf)

cat("\nPairwise Wilcoxon tests (BH adjusted):\n")
print(pairwise.wilcox.test(
  analysis_BC$log_mean_tpf,
  analysis_BC$Group_For_Plots,
  p.adjust.method = "BH",
  exact = FALSE
))

cat("\n")

# =========================================================
# FIGURE C — functional variability
# =========================================================

cat("FIGURE C: Functional variability by trophic strategy\n")
cat("------------------------------------\n")

cat("\nKruskal–Wallis test:\n")
print(kw_mean_bray)

cat("\nPairwise Wilcoxon tests (BH adjusted):\n")
print(pairwise.wilcox.test(
  analysis_BC$log_mean_bray,
  analysis_BC$Group_For_Plots,
  p.adjust.method = "BH",
  exact = FALSE
))

cat("\n")

# =========================================================
# GROUP SAMPLE SIZES
# =========================================================

cat("GROUP SAMPLE SIZES\n")
cat("------------------------------------\n")
print(table(analysis_df$Group_For_Plots))

cat("\n")

sink()

cat("\nSaved stats file:\n  ", normalizePath(stats_file), "\n", sep="")
```
